title: T-052 — UI: Expiry + shelf-life-rules surfaces — WH-019/WH-109/M-12 (WH §12.2, §12.5, §12.6)
prompt:
# T-052 — UI: Expiry + shelf-life-rules surfaces — WH-019/WH-109/M-12 (WH §12.2, §12.5, §12.6)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §12.2, §12.5, §12.6, §12.7, §16.6 WH-019/WH-109/M-12
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:363-480 (expiry_management_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:966-1007 (use_by_override_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:484-631 (Shelf Life Rules sub-page WH-109) (shelf_life_rules_admin_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1010-1048 (analog M-13 pattern WH-109) (shelf_life_rule_edit_modal)

## Goal
Implement /(app)/warehouse/expiry dashboard + use_by override modal + WH-109 Shelf-Life-Rules admin page + edit modal with 1:1 prototype parity. WH-109 CRUD is Phase 1 (2026-05-03 decision).

## Implementation contract
1. RSC `apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/expiry/page.tsx` with 2 tabs (Expired / Expiring Soon), cron header strip, alert summary, row actions context-driven by shelf_life_mode.
2. UseByOverride modal: Manager-only path with reason_code + reason_text + ack checkbox (T-037 server action).
3. RSC `/(app)/warehouse/settings/shelf-life-rules/page.tsx` + edit modal (Customer, Product, Min Shelf Life Days, Enforced switch, Reason, Notes).
4. Duplicate active customer+product blocked server-side; surface inline error.
5. All root elements expose `data-prototype-label`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/expiry/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/settings/shelf-life-rules/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/expiry/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:363-480 (expiry_management_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:966-1007 (use_by_override_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:484-631 (Shelf Life Rules sub-page WH-109) (shelf_life_rules_admin_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1010-1048 (analog M-13 pattern WH-109) (shelf_life_rule_edit_modal)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /warehouse/expiry renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:363-480 (expiry_management_page), then 2 tabs, cron header, action buttons (context-driven) match the prototype.
2. Given an expired use_by LP, when Manager clicks Override, then UseByOverride modal opens and requires reason_code + reason_text + ack before submit (T-037).
3. Given the Shelf-Life-Rules admin page renders, when an Admin/Manager opens it, then CRUD actions are enabled; when an Operator opens it, then access is denied (permission denied page).
4. Given a duplicate active rule for the same (customer, product) is attempted, when submit clicked, then server-side returns conflict and UI surfaces inline error.

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 4 labels, override flow, WH-109 CRUD + duplicate-block error, RBAC.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-expiry-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-expiry-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow Operator role to CRUD shelf-life rules (Phase 1 Admin/Manager only).
- Do not allow use_by override without ack + reason.
- Do not skip duplicate-rule guard.

## Dependencies
- T-008
- T-035
- T-036
- T-037
